faqs.question: How much does cockroach extermination cost in West Orange, NJ?
faqs.answer: Cockroach extermination in West Orange typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a cockroach problem in West Orange?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to West Orange residents. Our team understands that cockroach infestations require immediate attention, and we prioritize emergency calls to ensure your home or business is treated as quickly as possible.

faqs.question: What types of cockroaches are common in West Orange, NJ?
faqs.answer: West Orange properties most frequently deal with German cockroaches, American cockroaches, and Oriental cockroaches. German cockroaches are especially common in kitchens and bathrooms, while American cockroaches often enter from sewers and basements in older homes throughout the township.

faqs.question: Are your cockroach treatments safe for families and pets in West Orange homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We provide clear instructions on any necessary precautions and can discuss pet-friendly and child-safe treatment options during your free inspection.
